title: Kutaisi Airport Transfer Tips for First-Time Visitors
excerpt: What to know before landing at Kutaisi Airport, including transfer timing, luggage planning, and tour options.
author: Discover Kutaisi Team

seo.title: Kutaisi Airport Transfer Tips for First-Time Visitors
seo.description: Useful airport transfer tips for arriving in Kutaisi, including timing, luggage, and destination planning.
seo.ogTitle: Kutaisi Airport Transfer Tips for First-Time Visitors
seo.ogDescription: Useful airport transfer tips for arriving in Kutaisi, including timing, luggage, and destination planning.

contentBlocks.text: Kutaisi International Airport is a practical entry point for western Georgia. A small amount of planning before arrival can save significant time after landing.

items: Confirm your destination address in advance.
Share flight number and arrival time with your driver.
Consider luggage size when selecting vehicle type.
Keep a local eSIM or roaming plan ready.

contentBlocks.text: From Kutaisi Airport, many travelers continue to Kutaisi city center, Tbilisi, Batumi, or mountain destinations depending on their itinerary.
If your flight is late at night, pre-booking transfer is the most stress-free option.
Always keep a local contact number and your booking confirmation accessible while exiting the terminal.
